intended_use: MRCP+v1 is indicated for use as a software-based image processing system for non-invasive, quantitative assessment of biliary system structures by facilitating the generation, visualisation and review
intended_use_full: MRCP+v1 is indicated for use as a software-based image processing system for non-invasive, quantitative assessment of biliary system structures by facilitating the generation, visualisation and review of three-dimensional quantitative biliary system models and anatomical image data.
target_condition: Suspected hepatobiliary disease; evaluation of biliary system structures
ground_truth: Physically printed phantoms with known duct specifications; digital synthetic data; in-vivo volunteer and patient data
other_metrics: Algorithmic accuracy on digital synthetic data: Clinical Phantom 0.9mm (95% CI upper), -0.9mm (95% CI lower); Tube Width Phantom 1.3mm (upper), -0.6mm (lower). Device accuracy on physical phantoms: Clinical Phantom 1.0mm (upper), -1.1mm (lower); Tube Width Phantom 0.7mm (upper), -0.9mm (lower). Repeatability and reproducibility assessed across multiple metrics including tree volume, gallbladder volume, duct measurements (median, minimum, maximum, IQR), and duct width distributions.
